name: Bespoke Extracts, Inc.
summary: . Background Bespoke Extracts, Inc. is a Nevada corporation. The Companys Common Stock (as hereinafter defined) is traded in the United States on the OTCQB (the OTCQB) under the symbol BSPK. The Company has one wholly-owned subsidiary, Bespoke Extracts Colorado, LLC (Bespoke Colorado). Originally founded in 1988, Bespoke began operations in the cannabis industry in 2023 upon the acquisition of a state-licensed adult-use marijuana infused products business in Aurora, Colorado.
